name: The Brave vs Dragon
short_description: The Brave vs Dragon, downloaded for more than 100,000 times in Nintendo Switch and from the smartphones has been finally released in “Stream”! It is the only one idle game which you can operate easily.
detailed_description:
Variety of teams :
・Let’s go on a trip to defeat Satan by choosing three Braves from seven different unique Brave characters to make the team of three Braves!



Dogu Collection: [/]
-There are more than 100 types of "Dogu" available in the game, including swords, shields, and medicines!
As many as you collect, your fighting power will increase!



Battle :
・Do not miss the stimulating defeating battle in flashy action scenes under a nostalgic atmosphere!
Defeat the enemy by increasing the power of Brave(s)!

Collection of Items :
・You can get more than hundreds of “items” such as swords, shields, medicine, etc..!
The more items you collect, the more the battle power increases!

Complete the game by finding citizens, treasure inside the castle(coin “gacha”), and defeating the boss to collect those items!

・You can automate the actions of killer techniques smoothly! And you can grow Brave quickly by using the double speed function!
Also,there is defeated score ranking mode so that you can see your Brave rank!
Defeat an enemy and be a number one Brave!

Steam version function :
computer mouse operation, game controller function completely added.
(We recommend you to play the game using a computer mouse.)

New background graphics
The graphic of enemy characters added.

・Please enjoy playing “The Brave vs Dragon” on this occasion.

supported_languages: Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese, English, Korean
